note: DR/VEN born players removed (likely already on Latin winter clubs). Service days from BBRef when available.
service_note: mlb_service_days currently = career MLB gamesPlayed (sortable proxy); true roster service days TBD from BBRef
intl_definition: Y if player has LIDOM/LMP/LVBP/PWL/CS winter stats or Mexican League (MEX) stats; AFL and ABL do not count.
